TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Reuven Rivlin = Mntucing hngkawas 1939 idas 9 jiyax 9 ka Reuven Rivlin ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Israel ta sayang o kiya ka Reuven Rivlin, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Reuven Rivlin (kari Hiburu: ◊®◊ź◊ē◊Ď◊ü ◊®◊ô◊Ď◊ú◊ô◊ü‚Äé, kngkawas 1939 idas 9 diyax 9Ôľć), ryus Israel, seyji jnwu, mntumal Likud Tang. Kngkawas 2014 idas 7 prading, psdhuwan phiyu ngalan Soto Israel. Reuven Rivlin pa dmkuh keyngri ini khbaraw sediq, tukubeycu ka llutuc Arabia sediq Israel na kongmin keyngri, Reuven Rivlin pa ini sruwa Quri 2 Qnlhangan, smruwa Quri 1 Qnlhangan. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Reuven Rivlin pa mntuting Jerusalem, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Jerusalem Hiburi. Kngkawas 1988, wada mangal Israel Gikay Giying. Kngkawas 2003-2006 kiya mi kngkawas 2009-2013, mn2 ngalan Islael Gikay Gicyo. Kngkawas 2014 idas 6 diyax 10, Reuven Rivlin u ini niya baka ka Meir Sheetrit, wada mangal Soto Islael. Reuven Rivlin pa kcka cngtan Israel snquri nganguc na Ingpay, Reuven Rivlin u mndkuh Quri 1 Qnlhangan, ini sruwa Palestine phiyu qnlhangan, kiya mi dmkuh mniq mkngahu tuiwil Yayung Jordan pkrana tnpusu nniqan sediq Yodaya; Reuven Rivlin u mbiyax balay pkara qnbliqan llutuc Arabia sediq Islael. Qnita niya Reuven Rivlin pa, hbaraw balay llutuc Arabia sediq Islael u dmkuh Quri 1 Qnlhangan, nasi Islael u subway quri ini so Islael kndhu Palestine ka alang mkbrnux Arabia, so niyi u musa knbeyhing balay mqraqil dha. Kingal uri pa, nasi Islael pndungus sediq Palestine knou bay keyngri kongmin Islael, musa mrana knhbrawan hiyi ka llutuc Arabia sediq Islael, so niyi u musa mlih sntkuhan mita sediq Islael; nasi knkana sediq Palestine u to bay niqan keyngri kongmin Islael daw, knhbrawan hiyi Muslim Islael u musa hmrinas knhbrawan hiyi sediq Yodaya. Kiya mi Quri 1 Qnlhangan pa musa knbeyhing bay sntrngan Islael, kiya ka knkana danun 'Pkngatun Qnlhangan' u mkrinah tmraqil qmita Islael ka sediq Palestine, uka brahan dmuwi psnaqan qnabil muda pqnaqah sediq Palestine pkmlih smtali mcbu, kasi ka mndungus balay pndungus ou qnbliqan subway sediq Palestine uri.
S.PHON: = …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan is…ĺa…ôl ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin (ka…ĺi ńßibu…ĺu: ***** *******, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), …ĺjus is…ĺa…ôl, s…ô…üi …ünwu, mntumal likud taŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč, psdńßuwan pńßiju Ňčalan soto is…ĺa…ôl. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa dmkuńß k…ôŇč…ĺi ini kńßba…ĺaw s…ôdiq, tukub…ô ¶u ka llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq is…ĺa…ôl na koŇčmin k…ôŇč…ĺi, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa ini s…ĺuwa qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, sm…ĺuwa qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan. kndusan** …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa mntutiŇč …ü…ô…ĺusal…ôm, mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč …ü…ô…ĺusal…ôm ńßibu…ĺi. kŇčkawas ****, wada maŇčal is…ĺa…ôl gikaj gijiŇč. kŇčkawas ****-**** kija mi kŇčkawas ****-****, mn* Ňčalan isla…ôl gikaj gi ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u ini nija baka ka m…ôi…ĺ sńß…ô…ôt…ĺit, wada maŇčal soto isla…ôl. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa k ¶ka ¶Ňčtan is…ĺa…ôl snqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ na iŇčpaj, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u mndkuńß qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, ini s…ĺuwa pal…ôstin…ô pńßiju qnlńßaŇčan, kija mi dmkuńß mniq mkŇčańßu tuiwil jajuŇč …üo…ĺdan pk…ĺana tnpusu nniqan s…ôdiq jodaja; …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u mbijax balaj pka…ĺa qnbliqan llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl. qnita nija …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa, ńßba…ĺaw balaj llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl u dmkuńß qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, nasi isla…ôl u subwaj qu…ĺi ini so isla…ôl kndńßu pal…ôstin…ô ka alaŇč mkb…ĺnux a…ĺabia, so niji u musa knb…ôńßiŇč balaj mq…ĺaqil dńßa. kiŇčal u…ĺi pa, nasi isla…ôl pnduŇčus s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô knou baj k…ôŇč…ĺi koŇčmin isla…ôl, musa m…ĺana knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji ka llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl, so niji u musa mlińß sntkuńßan mita s…ôdiq isla…ôl; nasi knkana s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô u to baj niqan k…ôŇč…ĺi koŇčmin isla…ôl daw, knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji muslim isla…ôl u musa ńßm…ĺinas knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq jodaja. kija mi qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan pa musa knb…ôńßiŇč baj snt…ĺŇčan isla…ôl, kija ka knkana danun 'pkŇčatun qnlńßaŇčan' u mk…ĺinańß tm…ĺaqil qmita isla…ôl ka s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô, uka b…ĺańßan dmuwi psnaqan qnabil muda pqnaqańß s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô pkmlińß smtali m ¶bu, kasi ka mnduŇčus balaj pnduŇčus ou qnbliqan subwaj s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô u…ĺi.
S.FORM: = Reuven Rivlin = Mntucing hngkawas 1939 idas 9 jiyax 9 ka Reuven Rivlin ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Israel ta sayang o kiya ka Reuven Rivlin, pnaah hngkawas 2014 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Reuven Rivlin (kari Hiburu: ◊®◊ź◊ē◊Ď◊ü ◊®◊ô◊Ď◊ú◊ô◊ü‚Äé, kngkawas 1939 idas 9 diyax 9Ôľć), ryus Israel, seyji jnwu, mntumal Likud Tang. Kngkawas 2014 idas 7 prading, psdhuwan phiyu ngalan Soto Israel. Reuven Rivlin pa dmkuh keyngri ini khbaraw sediq, tukubeycu ka llutuc Arabia sediq Israel na kongmin keyngri, Reuven Rivlin pa ini sruwa Quri 2 Qnlhangan, smruwa Quri 1 Qnlhangan. KndusanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Reuven Rivlin pa mntuting Jerusalem, mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Jerusalem Hiburi. Kngkawas 1988, wada mangal Israel Gikay Giying. Kngkawas 2003-2006 kiya mi kngkawas 2009-2013, mn2 ngalan Islael Gikay Gicyo. Kngkawas 2014 idas 6 diyax 10, Reuven Rivlin u ini niya baka ka Meir Sheetrit, wada mangal Soto Islael. Reuven Rivlin pa kcka cngtan Israel snquri nganguc na Ingpay, Reuven Rivlin u mndkuh Quri 1 Qnlhangan, ini sruwa Palestine phiyu qnlhangan, kiya mi dmkuh mniq mkngahu tuiwil Yayung Jordan pkrana tnpusu nniqan sediq Yodaya; Reuven Rivlin u mbiyax balay pkara qnbliqan llutuc Arabia sediq Islael. Qnita niya Reuven Rivlin pa, hbaraw balay llutuc Arabia sediq Islael u dmkuh Quri 1 Qnlhangan, nasi Islael u subway quri ini so Islael kndhu Palestine ka alang mkbrnux Arabia, so niyi u musa knbeyhing balay mqraqil dha. Kingal uri pa, nasi Islael pndungus sediq Palestine knou bay keyngri kongmin Islael, musa mrana knhbrawan hiyi ka llutuc Arabia sediq Islael, so niyi u musa mlih sntkuhan mita sediq Islael; nasi knkana sediq Palestine u to bay niqan keyngri kongmin Islael daw, knhbrawan hiyi Muslim Islael u musa hmrinas knhbrawan hiyi sediq Yodaya. Kiya mi Quri 1 Qnlhangan pa musa knbeyhing bay sntrngan Islael, kiya ka knkana danun 'Pkngatun Qnlhangan' u mkrinah tmraqil qmita Islael ka sediq Palestine, uka brahan dmuwi psnaqan qnabil muda pqnaqah sediq Palestine pkmlih smtali mcbu, kasi ka mndungus balay pndungus ou qnbliqan subway sediq Palestine uri.
S.PHON: = …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan is…ĺa…ôl ta sajaŇč o kija ka …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin (ka…ĺi ńßibu…ĺu: ***** *******, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), …ĺjus is…ĺa…ôl, s…ô…üi …ünwu, mntumal likud taŇč. kŇčkawas **** idas * p…ĺadiŇč, psdńßuwan pńßiju Ňčalan soto is…ĺa…ôl. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa dmkuńß k…ôŇč…ĺi ini kńßba…ĺaw s…ôdiq, tukub…ô ¶u ka llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq is…ĺa…ôl na koŇčmin k…ôŇč…ĺi, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa ini s…ĺuwa qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, sm…ĺuwa qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan. kndusan** …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa mntutiŇč …ü…ô…ĺusal…ôm, mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč …ü…ô…ĺusal…ôm ńßibu…ĺi. kŇčkawas ****, wada maŇčal is…ĺa…ôl gikaj gijiŇč. kŇčkawas ****-**** kija mi kŇčkawas ****-****, mn* Ňčalan isla…ôl gikaj gi ¶jo. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u ini nija baka ka m…ôi…ĺ sńß…ô…ôt…ĺit, wada maŇčal soto isla…ôl. …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa k ¶ka ¶Ňčtan is…ĺa…ôl snqu…ĺi ŇčaŇču ¶ na iŇčpaj, …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u mndkuńß qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, ini s…ĺuwa pal…ôstin…ô pńßiju qnlńßaŇčan, kija mi dmkuńß mniq mkŇčańßu tuiwil jajuŇč …üo…ĺdan pk…ĺana tnpusu nniqan s…ôdiq jodaja; …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin u mbijax balaj pka…ĺa qnbliqan llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl. qnita nija …ĺ…ôu*…ôn …ĺi*lin pa, ńßba…ĺaw balaj llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl u dmkuńß qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan, nasi isla…ôl u subwaj qu…ĺi ini so isla…ôl kndńßu pal…ôstin…ô ka alaŇč mkb…ĺnux a…ĺabia, so niji u musa knb…ôńßiŇč balaj mq…ĺaqil dńßa. kiŇčal u…ĺi pa, nasi isla…ôl pnduŇčus s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô knou baj k…ôŇč…ĺi koŇčmin isla…ôl, musa m…ĺana knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji ka llutu ¶ a…ĺabia s…ôdiq isla…ôl, so niji u musa mlińß sntkuńßan mita s…ôdiq isla…ôl; nasi knkana s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô u to baj niqan k…ôŇč…ĺi koŇčmin isla…ôl daw, knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji muslim isla…ôl u musa ńßm…ĺinas knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq jodaja. kija mi qu…ĺi * qnlńßaŇčan pa musa knb…ôńßiŇč baj snt…ĺŇčan isla…ôl, kija ka knkana danun 'pkŇčatun qnlńßaŇčan' u mk…ĺinańß tm…ĺaqil qmita isla…ôl ka s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô, uka b…ĺańßan dmuwi psnaqan qnabil muda pqnaqańß s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô pkmlińß smtali m ¶bu, kasi ka mnduŇčus balaj pnduŇčus ou qnbliqan subwaj s…ôdiq pal…ôstin…ô u…ĺi.
